items.label: TMD documents concerns, deficiencies, and/or issues identified through this assessment
TMD documents actions taken to resolve; and at what level they were resolved (i.e. Unit; TMD; TF MED; JTF/CTF MED; Service Component Surgeon; CCMD Surgeon)
TMD develops a reporting process of completed assessments in coordination with the CCMD Surgeons office (with copy sent to JTS for inclusion into the joint lessons learned process)
